question: Find the names of stores whose number products is more than the average number of products.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM shop WHERE number_products  >  (SELECT avg(number_products) FROM shop)
predicted_sql: SELECT col_2 FROM shop WHERE col_5 > (SELECT AVG(col_5) FROM shop)
raw_response: SELECT col_2 FROM shop WHERE col_5 > (SELECT AVG(col_5) FROM shop)
